zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Wake於大約1280年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾布利斯沃斯。他於大約1321年與Elizabeth Cransley在英國諾薩普頓史爾可藍斯利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1347年3月15日在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯享年68歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾馬可特 迪平。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Wake于大约1280年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾布利斯沃斯。他于大约1321年与Elizabeth Cransley在英国諾薩普頓史爾可藍斯利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1347年3月15日在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯享年68岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾馬可特 迪平。

nameMeanings.name: Wake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: occupational name for ‘(man of) the watch’, from Middle English wak, wake ‘wake, vigil, watch, period of guard duty’ (Old English wacu, Old Norse vaka). It alternates with the synonymous Middle English wache (Old English wacce), hence the variant Watch. The surname was also interchangeable with Waite (the equivalent Old French term) which, like Wake, was sometimes translated as Latin vigil ‘(one who is) watchful, alert’. Compare the synonymous Vail . When the bearers had high social status, the surname probably denoted an officer with responsibility for the security of a castle, town, or royal person. Compare Wakeman .

variants.name: Vail
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French de la veille ‘of the watch, watchman’, with loss of de; compare Wake . There has been some confusion with the topographic name Vale and the nickname Veal .
Scottish: shortened and altered form of McPhail , Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phàil ‘son of Paul’.

variants.name: Waite
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name for a watchman, either in a town or castle, from Anglo-Norman French waite ‘watchman, member of the watch’ (of ancient Germanic origin; compare Wachter ). In the Middle Ages the town waits typically combined the functions of watchmen and musicians through being trumpeters or pipers. There may also have been some late confusion with White or Wheat .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Wake was born about 1280, in Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England. He married Elizabeth Cransley about 1321, in Cransley, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 15 March 1347, in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 68, and was buried in Market Deeping, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas Wake est né environ 1280, à Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Il a épousé Elizabeth Cransley environ 1321, à Cransley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 15 mars 1347, à Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Market Deeping, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Thomas Wake wurde um 1280 in Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England geboren. Er hat um 1321 in Cransley, Northamptonshire, England Elizabeth Cransley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. März 1347 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich und wurde in Market Deeping, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Thomas Wake è nato il circa 1280 nel Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England. Lui sposato Elizabeth Cransley circa 1321, nel Cransley, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 marzo 1347, nel Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Market Deeping, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Wakeは約1280年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブリスウオルスで生まれた。約1321年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアクランスリーでElizabeth Cransleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1347年3月15日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイスで68歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアマーケト ディーパングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Wake(은)는 대략 1280년 영국 노르섬프토실르 블리스워스에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1321년 영국 노르섬프토실르 크랜슬리에서 Elizabeth Cransley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1347년 3월 15일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 마크트 디핀그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Thomas Wake nasceu aproximadamente 1280, em Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Cransley aproximadamente 1321, em Cransley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de março de 1347, em Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Market Deeping, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Wake родился около 1280 г. в местности блисворт, нортамптоншир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Cransley около 1321 г. в местности крансли, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 15 марта 1347 г. в местности калеи, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности маркет дипинг, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Thomas Wake nació aproximadamente 1280, en Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Elizabeth Cransley aproximadamente 1321, en Cransley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de marzo de 1347, en Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Market Deeping, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
